raw_caption:
{
  "chronological\_analysis": "In this video, a young woman is seen seated at a restaurant table, surrounded by a variety of plates filled with food. The camera is positioned at eye level, focusing on her face and the food. The food appears abundant and appetizing, with a golden-brown crust on the chicken and a glossy glaze on the dumplings. The woman seems ready to start eating. The camera cuts to a close-up of the food, showing the textures of the meat, the sauce, and the steam rising from the dumplings. She picks up a spoon and takes a bite, revealing a full mouth. The camera then cuts to a close-up of the food again, showing the details of the meat and the sauce being mixed with the spoon. The woman pours a sauce into a bowl, which coats the food more evenly. The camera then cuts back to her face, and she takes another bite, this time with a cheese stretching effect. The scene is visually satisfying and the text '술안주' appears on-screen, matching the action of pouring the sauce.

\n
[Setup]: The camera captures the woman and the food from a close-up angle, showing her face and the food.
[Transition & Texture]: The camera zooms in on the food, revealing the textures of the meat, glaze, and steam rising from the dumplings.
[Peak Moment]: The woman takes a bite, showing a full mouth, and pours sauce into a bowl, which makes the food look more abundant and coated.
\n
[Highlight\_keywords]: Keyword 1: Fried Chicken, Keyword 2: Golden-brown crust, Keyword 3: Steaming, Keyword 4: Cheese stretching, Keyword 5: Pouring sauce"
}

parsed_json.chronological_analysis: In the video, the camera initially focuses on a close-up of a person holding a spoon, which is then followed by a shot of a large pile of food. The camera then cuts to a close-up of the food, showing the texture and details of the dish. The person is seen pouring sauce onto the food, which creates a visually satisfying moment. The camera then moves closer to capture the person's reaction as they eat the food, highlighting the taste and texture. The Korean subtitles appear, but they do not provide any additional context.
highlight_keywords: Close-up, Spoon, Pile of Food, Texture, Sauce, Eating

raw_caption: The video shows a young woman in a restaurant, seated at a table with a large plate of food in front of her. The camera is shot from a slightly elevated angle, looking down towards the plate, capturing the abundance of food. The woman appears to be eager and ready to start eating. The food looks appetizing, with a golden-brown crust on the chicken, indicating it might be fried. The lighting on the food gives it a glistening appearance, suggesting it might be glazed. The camera cuts to a close-up of the woman's spoon, showing the elasticity of the food as she takes a bite. The camera then zooms in to show the texture of the food, highlighting the rough edges and the cheese stretching. The woman takes a bite and the food is shown in close-up, with her mouth open wide, indicating a satisfying bite. The camera then cuts to a close-up of the chicken, showing the meat separating easily. The camera then returns to the woman's face, and she smiles, indicating her enjoyment of the food. The video ends with a close-up of the food, showing the steam rising, indicating that it's been freshly cooked. The Korean text "겉바속촉" appears on-screen, suggesting the chicken is well-cooked.
